name: EBV_integration_hotspots
description: EBV typically persists as a non-integrated episome but integrates sporadically in lymphomas and gastric/nasopharyngeal carcinomas. Integration events show enrichment at common fragile sites (FRA3B/FHIT, FRA16D/WWOX), MYC, BACH2, ETS1, TNFAIP3, and at GC-rich palindromic host regions. Breakpoints on the EBV side cluster within IR1/W and at the TR junction. Functional consequence varies: integrations into BACH2 in Burkitt lymphoma and into MYC enhancers in some endemic cases reshape host gene expression.
expected_copy_count: 0-10 integrated copies in EBV+ carcinomas; mostly episomal
